---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for RawLLM
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve or the improvement it would bring. E.g., "I'm frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Additional context

Any mockups, examples from other projects, or relevant research that supports the proposal.
